using System;
using NTypeForge;

namespace Demo
{
    public static class Btn_DuckTypingExtensions_a828696dbbd8af14127e9b177982d3a6
    {
        extension (global::Demo.Btn target)
        {
            public T Duck<T>() where T : class
            {
                if (typeof(T) == typeof(global::Demo.IButton))
                {
                    return (T)(object)new global::Demo.Btn_IButton_Proxy_e6b43586e55b9209c1fffe609e7144bf((global::Demo.Btn)target);
                }
                throw new global::System.InvalidOperationException("NTypeForge: no proxy was generated for " + typeof(T));
            }
        }
    }
}

// Demo_Proxies_8a2cc0673b1c428315fe84c0138d95c3.g.cs
// <auto-generated/>
using System;
using NTypeForge;

namespace Demo
{
    internal sealed class Btn_IButton_Proxy_e6b43586e55b9209c1fffe609e7144bf : global::Demo.IButton, IProxy<global::Demo.Btn>
    {
        private global::Demo.Btn __ntf_instance;

        public Btn_IButton_Proxy_e6b43586e55b9209c1fffe609e7144bf(global::Demo.Btn instance)
        {
            __ntf_instance = instance;
        }

        global::Demo.Btn IProxy<global::Demo.Btn>.Inner => __ntf_instance;
        object IProxy.Unwrapped => __ntf_instance;

        public void Press()
        {
            __ntf_instance.Press();
        }
        public event global::System.Action Click
        {
            add => __ntf_instance.Click += value;
            remove => __ntf_instance.Click -= value;
        }
    }

}
